mapper.select: SELECT m.conversation_id, CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END as other_user_id, CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END) = 1 THEN '管理员' ELSE COALESCE(su.username, '未知用户') END as other_user_name, CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END) = 1 THEN '' ELSE COALESCE(su.avatar, '') END as other_user_avatar, CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END) = 1 THEN 4 ELSE COALESCE(su.role_type, 0) END as other_user_type, m.content as last_message_content, m.create_time as last_message_time, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 ) as unread_count, m.related_order_id FROM message m LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON (CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END) = su.user_id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId}) AND m.message_id = ( SELECT MAX(message_id) FROM message WHERE conversation_id = m.conversation_id ) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT m.message_id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_id, su1.username as sender_name, su1.avatar as sender_avatar, m.receiver_id, su2.username as receiver_name, m.message_type, m.content, m.is_read, m.related_order_id, m.create_time FROM message m LEFT JOIN sys_user su1 ON m.sender_id = su1.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su2 ON m.receiver_id = su2.user_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY m.create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
SELECT conversation_id FROM message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.message_id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_id, su1.username as sender_name, su1.avatar as sender_avatar, m.receiver_id, su2.username as receiver_name, m.message_type, m.content, m.is_read, m.related_order_id, m.create_time FROM message m LEFT JOIN sys_user su1 ON m.sender_id = su1.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su2 ON m.receiver_id = su2.user_id WHERE (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.conversation_id, CASE WHEN m.sender_id = 1 THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END as other_user_id, su.username as other_user_name, su.avatar as other_user_avatar, su.role_type as other_user_type, m.content as last_message_content, m.create_time as last_message_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND receiver_id = 1 AND is_read = 0) as unread_count, m.related_order_id FROM message m LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON (CASE WHEN m.sender_id = 1 THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END) = su.user_id WHERE (m.sender_id = 1 OR m.receiver_id = 1) AND m.message_id = ( SELECT MAX(message_id) FROM message WHERE conversation_id = m.conversation_id ) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
